Est. 1999 · St. Augustine

Looking younger in the Oldest City — for over 25 years.

Most med spas don't make it five years. Fountain of Youth has earned a quarter century of trust: physician-owned, woman-owned, with MDs, nurse injectors, and medical aestheticians across four locations.

Expert Treatments

From injectables to wellness — every service supervised by our medical team.

Injectables

  • Botox, Xeomin, Dysport
  • Juvederm, Voluma, Radiesse
  • Sculptra, Kybella
  • Biostimulatory body fillers

Lasers & Skin

  • Fraxel, IPL, RF microneedling
  • Laser hair removal
  • Laser tattoo removal
  • Custom facials & peels

Wellness

  • Medical weight loss
  • BHRT hormone pellets
  • Eminence Organic & ZO facials
  • Dermaplaning & peels

Twenty-five years of word of mouth. Now, answers in seconds.

The same trusted care, now with a concierge that never sleeps.

Ask Sage anything — day or night, from any device.
